bead.title: Rename DDx execution internals away from agent vocabulary
bead.description:
PROBLEM
DDx internals still use `cli/internal/agent`, AgentRunRuntime, AgentRunner, ExecuteBead*, and related names for DDx-owned task execution. After the spec update, those names will be wrong: DDx owns task execution, while Fizeau owns routing/execution internals. Keeping `agent` as the DDx package name invites future routing-policy drift and confusion with real external AI agents.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
cli/internal/agent/ contains DDx-owned queue drain, bead attempt, review, worktree, session evidence, and Fizeau adapter code. Existing refactor bead ddx-387a0178 still targets cli/internal/agent/try and cli/internal/agent/work and acceptance #7 keeps deprecated `ddx agent` aliases. Existing terminology bead ddx-3ee4ddcf still says not to remove legacy aliases. Those plans conflict with the no-deprecation decision and with FEAT-010 task-execution vocabulary.

PROPOSED FIX
After specs are ratified and the Fizeau contract cleanup release is integrated, split/rename DDx-owned internals to names matching responsibilities, for example `cli/internal/taskexec`, `cli/internal/taskexec/run`, `cli/internal/taskexec/try`, `cli/internal/taskexec/work`, `cli/internal/fizeauadapter`, and `cli/internal/runlog` or equivalent repo-consistent names. Rename exported/internal identifiers accordingly: AgentRunRuntime -> TaskRunRuntime or FizeauRunRuntime as appropriate; AgentRunner -> TaskExecutor/FizeauExecutor; ExecuteBead* -> Try/Attempt/Work terms. Keep `agent` only in literal external-agent concepts, historical event keys that cannot be migrated safely, or third-party standards names.

NON-SCOPE
Do not remove the public `ddx agent` CLI in this bead unless it is already covered by ddx-d8474e0e. Do not change queue behavior, retry policy, review gates, or routing semantics. Do not implement Fizeau fuzzy matching. Do not rename durable tracker keys unless a migration plan is included in a separate bead.

PARENT AND DEPENDENCIES
Parent: ddx-f088a3fd. Depends on: ddx-424fdac4 and ddx-7065edd1.
bead.acceptance:
1. DDx-owned production code no longer lives under `cli/internal/agent`; remaining `agent` package/path references are audited as literal external-agent, generated historical data, or compatibility storage.
2. FEAT-010 package/path references match the implemented package names.
3. All new or renamed DDx task-execution identifiers use run/try/work/taskexec/fizeauadapter vocabulary rather than Agent/ExecuteBead/ExecuteLoop vocabulary, except audited durable compatibility names.
4. Existing stale beads ddx-387a0178 and ddx-3ee4ddcf are updated, closed as superseded, or otherwise made non-dispatchable so they no longer instruct workers to preserve `ddx agent` aliases or create new `cli/internal/agent` packages.
5. `rg -n "cli/internal/agent|AgentRunRuntime|AgentRunner|ExecuteBead|ExecuteLoop|ddx agent" cli docs .agents/skills .claude/skills skills` returns only audited retained hits documented in the implementation notes.
6. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/... ./internal/... -run "Test.*(Run|Try|Work|Fizeau|Terminology|Routing).*" -count=1` passes after updating exact final test names.
7. `cd cli && go test ./...` passes.
8. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
